====Pokémon==== {{anchor|Alcremie 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie |giga=yes |type1=Fairy |gender=female |img=Opal Alcremie Adventures.png |img_size=120px |img2=Opal Gigantamax Alcremie Adventures.png |img2_size=150px |cap=Opal's Alcremie |cap2=Opal's Gigantamax Alcremie |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{p|Alcremie}} is Opal's first known Pokémon. She was first used in Opal's Gym battle against [[Henry Sword|Henry]], where she bombarded his {{p|Sirfetch'd}}, [[Lancelot]], with a barrage of high-calorie cream missiles. After surviving Alcremie's attacks, Lancelot defeated her with a {{m|Max Steelspike}} boosted by an [[Expert Belt]]. Alcremie's only known move is {{m|Draining Kiss}}{{tt|*|Mentioned only}}.
As a Gigantamax Alcremie, she can use {{m|G-Max Finale}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Weezing |type1=Poison |type2=Fairy |img=Opal Weezing Adventures.png |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Weezing}} is Opal's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Henry Sword|Henry]]'s {{p|Sirfetch'd}}, [[Lancelot]], in a Gym battle, but was defeated. Weezing's only known move is {{m|Sludge Bomb}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Togekiss |type1=Fairy |type2=Flying |img=Opal Togekiss Adventures.png |img_size=130px |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{p|Togekiss}} is Opal's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Henry Sword|Henry]]'s {{p|Gurdurr}}, Steeler, in a Gym battle, but was quickly defeated. Togekiss's only known move is {{m|Double-Edge}}.}}
